commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Policy plugin sandbox posture evidence, doctor checks, tests, and docs, including new sandbox policy keys, scoped `sandboxBackends`, and unobservable-backend findings.

PR surface: Source +1399, Tests +1145, Docs -115. Total +2429 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The PR body and follow-up comments provide terminal-style policy-check proof and focused test results for the new behavior.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review is required because the PR has a protected label and introduces compatibility/security-sensitive Policy configuration semantics; no narrow automated repair is indicated.
